creator: mph@pobox.com
text:
Submission of new port, c2ps 3.0:

A PostScript pretty-printer for C source with numerous features.
See http://www.geocities.com/SiliconValley/Park/2055/ for details.
Released under the GPL by Dmitri Shtilman <dash@vision10.technion.ac.il>
and Dmitri Makarov <dimm@vnet.ibm.com>.

Fix: 

Port uploaded to ftp.freebsd.org as c2ps-3.0-port.tar.gz
